subject: docs(user-guide): add missing admin features and fix stale auth note
body:
The Admin section was missing documentation for Bulk Import and Bulk
Price Update screens, and incorrectly stated that admin login was not
yet configured (auth is fully implemented with login, role check, and
route guard). Also added coordinate picker and station edit details.

Tags: documentation, admin, user-guide
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: documentation
Semver: patch

title: add missing admin features and fix stale auth note
